rag_rules: Use validator diagnostics to identify and fix only the missing EOF at 'annex' error in the current component implementation scope
generic_rules: Repair validator diagnostics without changing unrelated architecture or requirements
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Place guarantees in component type annexes and assignments in implementation annexes
Use assign only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `eq name : type = expression;` for helper declarations
Use `assign output = expression;` for implementation-level bindings
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Do not use subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables or outputs
Do not add architecture to fix unresolved references; trace and fix the root cause instead
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
